title: Yield overview
intro: Analyze expected harvest quantities from your planting plans. More yield widgets can be added here later.

errors.load: Yield overview could not be loaded.

chart.title: Yield distribution
chart.description: Expected yields per calendar week, calculated from the existing planting plans.

empty.noPlansDescription: Yield forecasts become available once you create planting plans. Expected harvest quantities are then calculated automatically from crop data and planning periods.
empty.noYieldDescription: The current planting plans do not have calculable yields yet. Check crop yield data and harvest periods in your planting plans.

future.title: Ready for more yield analysis
future.description: This page is prepared for additional metrics such as weekly and monthly overviews, yield by crop, bed or location, and expected versus actual comparisons.
